data.title: Liaoning Port Re-elects Cheng Chaoying as Director
data.description:
Liaoning Port Company Limited Class H (HK:2880) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Liaoning Port Company Limited has announced the re-election of Ms. Cheng Chaoying as an independent non-executive director after her health improved, allowing her to continue her roles within the company. Ms. Cheng’s previous resignation will be withdrawn, and she will serve until the end of the current board session, earning an annual remuneration of RMB200,000. This decision underscores the company’s commitment to stability and experienced leadership.

data.title: FireFox Gold Reports Promising Jeesiö Project Results
data.description:
FireFox Gold Corp. (TSE:FFOX) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

FireFox Gold Corp has reported encouraging results from its Jeesiö Project in Lapland, Finland, highlighting a new gold-rich zone at the Saittavaara prospect and significant gold mineralization at the KJ Hill prospect. The exploration program, which included trenching and rock sampling, revealed high-grade gold values, expanding the project’s potential. These findings position the Jeesiö Project as a key priority for FireFox Gold’s exploration efforts.

data.title: Close Brothers Granted Supreme Court Appeal Permission in ‘Hopcraft’ Case
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest announcement is out from Close Brothers Group ( (GB:CBG) ).

Close Brothers Limited has been granted permission by the Supreme Court to appeal a decision by the Court of Appeal regarding the ‘Hopcraft’ motor finance commissions case. This development could potentially impact Close Brothers’ operations and market positioning within the financial sector. The company has stated that it will not comment further on the ongoing appeals process but will issue further announcements when appropriate.

More about Close Brothers Group

Close Brothers is a leading UK merchant banking group that provides lending, deposit taking, wealth management services, and securities trading. The company operates primarily in the United Kingdom and Ireland, employing around 4,000 people. It is listed on the London Stock Exchange and is part of the FTSE 250 index.

data.title: IAG Announces Updated Share Capital and Voting Rights
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

International Consolidated Airlines ( (GB:IAG) ) has issued an update.

International Consolidated Airlines Group announced that as of December 10, 2024, it holds 100,809,118 treasury shares, with the issued share capital amounting to 4,870,666,892 shares that carry voting rights. This disclosure is crucial for shareholders to determine their reporting obligations to the Spanish National Securities Market Commission (CNMV), highlighting the company’s transparency efforts and its commitment to regulatory compliance.

More about International Consolidated Airlines

International Consolidated Airlines Group, S.A. (IAG) operates in the airline industry, providing air transportation services across various regions. The company focuses on maintaining a diverse portfolio of airline brands to cater to different market segments.

Khoon Group Limited successfully passed all proposed resolutions during its Annual General Meeting held on December 11, 2024. Longhui International Holdings Ltd. has announced a board reshuffle with the resignation of Mr. Shum Kei Yiu Daniel as an independent non-executive director, and the appointment of Ms. Leung Chee Wai Mochi to the role. Xaar plc ( (GB:XAR) ) has shared an update.

Xaar plc, a leader in inkjet printing technology, announced that it will publish a trading update for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, on January 15, 2025. This update will provide stakeholders with insights into the company’s financial performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and future strategic decisions.

More about Xaar plc

Xaar is an inkjet innovator providing printheads and technologies for OEM and UDI customers globally. The company serves various markets, including graphics, packaging, textiles, and more, with a focus on sustainable manufacturing innovation through its digital printhead and precision jetting technologies.
